aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite Premier Heating & Air due to significant gaps in structured data, conversational content, and authority signals.
quick_wins: Implement LocalBusiness schema markup to improve AI visibility.
Create an FAQ section with questions and answers about HVAC services.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is not found, making the business invisible to Google AI and local search.
critical_issues: Google Business Profile is not set up.
Lack of GBP photos, posts, and Q&A to engage potential customers.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional relevant directories.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content makes the site less relevant to AI queries.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Local HVAC service queries that should prioritize their business.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQ schema markup.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Highlighting certifications, expertise, and media presence to establish authority.

agency_pitch.hook: Premier Heating & Air is invisible to AI, losing 40% of potential leads.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on local customers who rely on AI assistants for recommendations.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Google Business Profile is not found, and there is no structured data to aid AI in citing their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO approach will implement schema markup, optimize authority signals, and optimize GBP to make Premier Heating & Air a top AI recommendation.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Waiting means falling behind competitors who are already optimized for AI search.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads: Premier Heating & Air's AEO Opportunity
opening_line: We analyzed your website and found significant opportunities to improve your visibility with AI assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your business stand out to AI and capture more local leads.
page_title: HVAC Services in Memphis, TN, | Repair, Installation & Replacement
